# SΔϕ AI-readable mirror

This repository is an AI-readable routing and ingestion layer for selected Sofience–DeltaPhi packages.

Canonical citation layer: Zenodo DOI.  
AI ingestion layer: GitHub Markdown, TXT, YAML, JSON.

## Start files

- `00_AI_ENTRYPOINT.md`
- `SDELTA_ACCESS_PROTOCOL.yaml`
- `SDELTA_MODULE_ROUTING.yaml`
- `pipeline/00_BOOTSTRAP_PIPELINE.yaml`
- `pipeline/06_PIPELINE_INDEX_FOR_AI.md`
- `SERIES_INDEX.json`
- `SERIES_DOI_MAP.json`

## Minimal boot

```text
01 -> 03 -> 47 -> 62
```

Meaning:

```text
minimal phase-change core
-> irreversibility as minimal existence condition
-> operation leaves irreversible trace
-> trace / inference / UMR / binding / revision path separation
```

## Operational diagnostic boot

```text
47 -> 62 -> 39 -> 65 -> 64 -> 56
```

## Root spine

```text
01 -> 03 -> 47
```

## Evidence discipline

```text
62 -> 39
```

## Surface-cost discipline

```text
65 -> 64 -> 56
```

## Subject / agency / responsibility

```text
01 -> 03 -> 02 -> 04 -> 05 -> 06 -> 07 -> 08
```

## Closure / residual / re-entry

```text
08 -> 09 -> 10
```

## Ethics / path / victory

```text
41 -> 44 -> 45
```

## Root package DOIs

- SDeltaPhi-01 AI-readable package: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20250823
- SDeltaPhi-03 AI-readable package: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20251725

## Root canonical paper DOIs

- SDeltaPhi-00 series overview: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18731366
- SDeltaPhi-01 canonical paper: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18730265
- SDeltaPhi-02 canonical paper: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18730296
- SDeltaPhi-03 canonical paper: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18730448

## Output discipline

Trace before claim.  
UMR before certainty.  
Re-entry before closure.  
Cost before declaration.  
Path geometry before policy belief.
